# Safe Patch and Verify Skill

## Objective
Apply minimal fixes safely and prove they work.

## Workflow
1. Propose smallest viable patch.
2. Limit scope to root-cause files.
3. Re-run repro steps and relevant tests.
4. Confirm no regression in adjacent flows.
5. Summarize risk and rollback path.

## Acceptance
- Original issue reproduced and resolved
- No new errors introduced in touched paths
- Verification evidence recorded
